name: Kraken X60
note: Categorized as motor-controller despite the integrated motor — this is its primary functional role in the rules engine. Part number needs verification against the WCP catalog. The motor is integrated; there is no separate motor output port.

ports.name: Power Input
ports.note: 10AWG pre-crimped ring terminals per product documentation. Voltage range 6-24V assumed similar to other motor controllers — verify from WCP/CTR spec sheet.

ports.name: CAN
ports.note: 22AWG twisted pair. Connector type (ring-terminal) needs verification against hardware documentation — may differ by revision.
